task_completion.description: Review the LCA specification document on the desktop
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor or document viewer window open displaying the contents of 'lca_spec.txt' from the desktop, showing carbon factors for materials.

task_completion.description: Create 'C30/37 Concrete' material with required property set and property
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Blender/Bonsai material properties panel showing a new material named 'C30/37 Concrete'. Within its IFC properties, look for the addition of 'Pset_EnvironmentalImpactIndicators' and a property named 'GlobalWarmingPotential' with an assigned value.

task_completion.description: Create 'Structural Timber' material with required property set and property
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Blender/Bonsai material properties panel showing a new material named 'Structural Timber'. Within its IFC properties, look for the addition of 'Pset_EnvironmentalImpactIndicators' and a property named 'GlobalWarmingPotential' with an assigned value.

task_completion.description: Assign 'C30/37 Concrete' material to IfcSlab elements
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Blender viewport or outliner showing IfcSlab elements selected, with the 'C30/37 Concrete' material actively assigned to them in the material properties tab.

task_completion.description: Assign 'Structural Timber' material to IfcWall elements
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Blender viewport or outliner showing IfcWall elements selected, with the 'Structural Timber' material actively assigned to them in the material properties tab.

task_completion.description: Save the updated project to the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Save As' or 'Export' dialog within Blender showing the file being saved as 'fzk_embodied_carbon.ifc' in the '/home/ga/BIMProjects/' directory.

integrity.description: Agent used the Blender/Bonsai GUI to complete the task
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify that the agent interacted with the Blender interface to create materials and assign properties, rather than using terminal commands or Python scripts.

integrity.description: Agent did not edit the IFC file as plain text
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the agent did not open the .ifc file in a text editor to manually type in the material definitions, property sets, or assignments.

integrity.description: Agent genuinely selected and assigned materials to 3D elements
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for visual confirmation in the 3D viewport or outliner that specific IfcSlab and IfcWall elements were selected during the material assignment process.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating two specific materials: 'C30/37 Concrete' and 'Structural Timber'. Both materials must be enriched with the property set 'Pset_EnvironmentalImpactIndicators' containing the property 'GlobalWarmingPotential'. The LCA specification document is located at /home/ga/Desktop/lca_spec.txt. The final updated model must be saved exactly to /home/ga/BIMProjects/fzk_embodied_carbon.ifc.
